displayTitle: Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures #9
synopsis: Boba Fett makes his first appearance ever in this issue of Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures! The galaxy's meanest bounty hunter made his debut in the Star Wars daily newspaper strips reprinted herein, featuring Luke and Han hunted on an icy tundra by the enigmatic masked man, Boba Fett!
title: Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures #9
